message:
fix(optim): harden SGD/Adam/AdamW with overflow-safe step counting, gradient shape validation, and state length checks

Adds four new safety helpers to the optimizer module:
- optimizer_state_error(): constructs AutogradError for state issues
- checked_next_step_count(): uses checked_add(1) on u64 step counter,
  returning an error on overflow instead of wrapping
- ensure_grad_len_matches_param(): validates gradient vector length matches
  parameter length, returning TensorGradientShapeMismatch on mismatch
- ensure_state_len(): validates optimizer internal state vector length
  matches gradient length

All three optimizers (SGD, Adam, AdamW) now:
- Call ensure_grad_len_matches_param() after fetching param values
- Cache param_shape once via tensor_values_meta() instead of calling it
  multiple times per step (reducing redundant metadata lookups)
- Call ensure_state_len() on momentum/velocity state vectors before use
- (Adam/AdamW) Use checked_next_step_count() instead of bare += 1

New regression tests:
- sgd_rejects_mismatched_velocity_state_length
- adam_rejects_step_counter_overflow
- adamw_rejects_step_counter_overflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
